title: litsea aestivalis
intro: Litsea aestivalis, also known as the Northern Prince, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia, belonging to the family Lauraceae. The medicinal properties of Litsea aestivalis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include relieving coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Litsea aestivalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
